name: negative-indent-no-prefix
description: Paragraph with w:left=-360, tab at 720, text '\tBody text...' (tab but no prefix). Tests tab absorption without prefix stripping.
expected_behavior: left=-360, first_line=None (no firstLine set, tab absorption should not fire). The tab positions the text but doesn't change the indent model.
current_status: TESTING — tab absorption branch gated on first_line_twips!=0
